privacyContent: At BIM Earth Consultancy, accessible from bimearth.com, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by BIM Earth Consultancy and how we use it. If you have additional questions or require more information about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us. This Privacy Policy applies only to our online activities and is valid for visitors to our website with regards to the information that they shared and/or collect in BIM Earth Consultancy. This policy is not applicable to any information collected offline or via channels other than this website. By using our website, you hereby consent to our Privacy Policy and agree to its terms. We collect personal information such as Name, Email Address, Phone Number, Company Name, and project details when you book a consultation or submit a contact request. This information is used strictly to establish corporate communications, coordinate project parameters, schedule engineering appointments, and submit architectural updates via EmailJS or direct SMTP pathways. We do not sell, rent, trade, or distribute your personal details to third-party databases, tracking platforms, or advertising brokers.
termsContent: Welcome to BIM Earth Consultancy! These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of BIM Earth Consultancy's Website, located at bimearth.com. By accessing this website we assume you accept these terms and conditions. Do not continue to use BIM Earth Consultancy if you do not agree to take all of the terms and conditions stated on this page. The following terminology applies to these Terms and Conditions, Privacy Statement and Disclaimer Notice and all Agreements: 'Client', 'You' and 'Your' refers to you, the person log on this website and compliant to the Company's terms and conditions. 'The Company', 'Ourselves', 'We', 'Our' and 'Us', refers to our Company. 'Party', 'Parties', or 'Us', refers to both the Client and ourselves. All terms refer to the offer, acceptance and consideration of payment necessary to undertake the process of our assistance to the Client in the most appropriate manner for the express purpose of meeting the Client's needs in respect of provision of the Company's stated services, in accordance with and subject to, prevailing law of California. Any use of the above terminology or other words in the singular, plural, capitalization and/or he/she or they, are taken as interchangeable and therefore as referring to same. Unless otherwise stated, BIM Earth Consultancy and/or its licensors own the intellectual property rights for all material on BIM Earth Consultancy. All intellectual property rights are reserved.
